title: Indian-Style Pistachio Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir-fry made with pistachios, vegetables, and a blend of Indian spices. This dish is gluten-free and perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onions and bell peppers and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger, garlic, and pistachios and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cilantro and cook for 1 minute, until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
If desired, serve with basmati rice or naan bread.
